categories.name: Ultrabooks
categories.description: Ultra-portable laptops with premium battery life and compact form factors. Scored primarily on portability and battery endurance. Ideal for travel and on-the-go professionals.

categories.name: Budget Workhorses
categories.description: High-value laptops that deliver strong productivity for budget-conscious buyers. Optimised for value-score and productivity-score at budget and mid price points.

categories.name: Performance Gaming Laptops
categories.description: Top-tier gaming laptops with gaming scores above 88. Optimised for GPU performance, display refresh rate, and thermal management. Suited to serious and competitive gamers.
